title: World Spas
subTitle: The host experiences the nurturing environment and luxurious treatment provided at the largest spa in the Middle East, located in Jordan.

title: Indonesia's Romantic Getaway
subTitle: Apart from scenic temples and rich heritage, Bali is also an excellent landmark that showcases nature's beauty in its gushing waterfalls, vast rice fields and secret canyons.

title: Unwind
subTitle: Sabrina explores the Palace hotel in Dubai and tries local delicacies before visiting the Dubai Mall and Dubai Fountain.

title: Viajar Mexico
subTitle: The host, Charlie Rubio, travels through Santiago, Mexico, exploring its breathtaking beauty and showcasing its less explored and adventurous side.

title: Unplanned Trip
subTitle: From paragliding to ziplining, the adventures Roshni has in Mechuka give her an intense adrenaline rush and helps her find herself.

title: 10 Days South Africa
subTitle: The presenter explores the rich natural heritage, beautiful landscapes and exotic wildlife on a 10 day safari in the Kruger National Park, South Africa.

title: World Spas
subTitle: The host sheds light on the Zara spa at the Mövenpick Hotel, which is an oasis of luxury in the barren expanse of Amman, Jordan.

title: Indonesia's Romantic Getaway
subTitle: Two actors travel to Labuan Bajo, a popular fishing town lined with pristine beaches and coral reefs in order to go on exciting boat rides.

title: Heritage
subTitle: The host provides deeper insights into the bathing practices adopted by the ancient Romans whilst highlighting key pointers surrounding the civilisation.

title: Landmarks
subTitle: Built in stone in 1270 by Henry the third, the original York Castle is no more today, but its main tower, the Clifford's Tower, stands as a reminder of the once amazing fortress.

title: Bliss
subTitle: Innsbruck is also known as the capital of the Austrian Alps. This place is not just home to stunning Alpine scenery, but also great place for Bobsleigh sport.

title: Best From the Rest
subTitle: The host travels to some of the most sought-after destinations around the world to learn about the culture and traditions of the regions.

title: 50 States Georgia
subTitle: Savannah's elegance conceals a past that refuses silence.

title: Indonesia's Romantic Getaway
subTitle: Located in Central Java, Borobudur is one of the greatest Buddhist monuments in the world, offering a serene atmosphere of peace and quite to the arriving visitors.

title: Heritage
subTitle: The presenter sheds light on Bryggen, a historic harbour district in Bergen, one of North Europe's oldest port cities on Norway's west coast.

title: Landmarks
subTitle: The Museum of Broken Relationships is dedicated to failed relationships and contains personal objects left over from former lovers, accompanied by brief descriptions.

subTitle: The host, Charlie Rubio, travels through Cuatro Cienegas, Mexico, exploring its breathtaking beauty and showcasing its scenic landscapes and sandy beaches.

subTitle: The host takes a trip to Cyprus and explores the heritage and archaeological sites of Khirokitia and Paphos in Cyprus unknown to a lot of travellers.

subTitle: Genevieve's travelling adventures in Costa Rica begin in the capital city, San Jose, where she checks off some Costa Rican rites of passage.

subTitle: The host visits the town of Badami in Karnataka, India, to explore the cultural heritage, cuisines, natural beauty and communal activities offered by the locality.

subTitle: The host travels to Spain, Europe's mountainous country, to explore its architecture, landscapes, local culture and culinary experiences.

subTitle: Delhi's Mughlai cuisine. Some people call them Retro dishes but to some it is just good old comfort food that never goes out of style.

subTitle: Sabrina explores Salzburg, a picturesque city not just known for Mozart but also its beautiful churches, castles and palaces.

title: Costa Rica Calling
subTitle: Guided by her love for coffee, Genevieve ventures into the heart of Heredia, a lush coffee-growing region.

title: Backpack
subTitle: The host travels to Hampi, India, taking in the sights of the city and enjoying the breathtaking architecture of its ancient monuments and temples.

title: Xplore Spain
subTitle: The host sheds light on the city of Madrid, the capital of Spain, which is located in the heart of the Iberian Peninsula and is the centre for business as well as home to the Spanish Royal family.

subTitle: Finding out about `forgotten' recipes which have been cherished for centuries and which may still be popular. This time, remembering the aroma of the simple food cooked over slow fire. Reliving happy taste-bud moments in Amritsar.

subTitle: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that's urban yet traditional in nature.

subTitle: In the heart of Costa Rica's countryside, Genevieve embarks on a journey of cultural immersion in Chilamate.

subTitle: The host travels through Kabini, India, taking in the beauty of its rich Indo-Islamic architecture while also appreciating its spectacular landscape and wildlife.

subTitle: The host travels to Spain, Europe's mountainous country, to explore its architecture, landscapes, local culture and culinary experiences.

subTitle: The adventurous host Alex Outhwaite explores Hoshiarpur, Punjab and joins Chef Navdeep to recreate some forgotten recipes.

subTitle: Alexandra explores the capital city, Tashkent, starting from Khast Imam Square and tries the traditional cuisine before visiting the beautiful Lake Charvak.

subTitle: Costa Rica is home to nearly 30 national parks, and Genevieve sets out to explore one of them, Rincón de la Vieja.

title: Backpack
subTitle: Sommer sets out on a boat safari and acquires knowledge of wildlife conservation. Later, she explores biodiversity by living on a houseboat.

title: Xplore Spain
subTitle: The host travels to Spain, Europe's mountainous country, to explore its architecture, landscapes, local culture and culinary experiences.

title: Quest
subTitle: Alex Outhwaite meets a Nawab in Lucknow, who shows her how to make Gosht Mawazad, a decadent Awadhi dish with mutton and dry fruits.

title: Heritage
subTitle: The filmmaker sheds light on Bodh Gaya, one of the earliest sacred destinations of the followers of Buddhism and reflects on its architecture.

title: Landmarks
subTitle: In a society of diverse religious institutions and beliefs, a small but significant space is occupied by places that have made their mark in our memories and thought.

title: World Spas
subTitle: The host explores the Kamalaya Resort in Koh Samui, Thailand, to unwind and relax under the tropical sun. This luxury resort offers its guests some relaxing spas and healthy detox retreats.

title: Costa Rica Calling
subTitle: Genevieve is drawn to Costa Rica's stunning Guanacaste region by the promise of thrilling water adventures.

title: Backpack
subTitle: Sommer Shiels learns about the local ways of life at the backwaters of Kerala. She also goes cycling along the hills and tea plantations of Munnar.

title: 72 Hours Unplugged
subTitle: When the laptops are shut and the suits come off, Pilar Malo dives headfirst into the heart of the world's greatest cities.

title: Quest
subTitle: Alex Outhwaite meets the descendants of the royal families of Hyderabad and Lucknow, and they tell her about the culture and cuisine of both kingdoms.

title: Heritage
subTitle: The host sheds light on the Stonehenge, a prehistoric upright monumental structure in England, whilst highlighting its historical significance.

title: Landmarks
subTitle: The host provides deeper insights into a renowned floating market that attracts tourists in large numbers whilst highlighting businesses functioning over there.

title: World Spas
subTitle: The host sheds light on the Zara spa at the Mövenpick Hotel, which is an oasis of luxury in the barren expanse of Amman, Jordan.

title: Costa Rica Calling
subTitle: Genevieve ventures deep into Puntarenas and seeks an adrenaline rush in the lush embrace of Monteverde, a canton of the province.

title: Backpack
subTitle: The host travels through Ahmedabad taking in the sights of the culture rich city while also appreciating the wildlife found in the Gir National Park.

title: 72 Hours Unplugged
subTitle: Berlin does not care who you are, it only asks if you can keep up. Pilar Malo is about to find out if she has what it takes to survive in this city.

title: Xplore Spain
subTitle: Alex visits San Sebastián, one of Barcelona's oldest and most traditional beaches, and Camp Nou stadium, home to FC Barcelona. Later, she enjoys delicious seafood and strong sangrias.

title: Quest
subTitle: On a journey to find the lost and forgotten recipes of traditional India, Alexandra finds herself at Asia's biggest spice market.

subTitle: The presenter tells the tales of the Pattadakal temples, which are built by kings and claim their legitimacy from gods, before focusing on the legacy of sun worshippers.
